summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with full-stack web development experience building and deploying production applications. Developed end-to-end web applications with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, implemented RESTful APIs for data-driven features, and maintained automated test suites ensuring quality across every deployment. Strong foundation in object-oriented programming, SQL databases, and collaborative software development in fast-paced environments.
